free_text: Protons from the p+d breakup reaction at proton
energies of 14 MeV and 10 MeV
Institute for Nuclear Study
Faculty of Science
- Chemical-form of target is element. purity of 99%
- Physical-form of target is gas.
Institute for Nuclear Study
Y. C and S. H
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and proton
The errors indicated are due to counting
statistics and uncertainties in the
corrections of particle loss due to the
multiple scattering.
